reviews.comment:
Un lugar imprescindible para tomar un café y relajarse luego de horas al volante. La única estación de servicio entre Comodoro y Trelew. Atención cordial y precios razonables.

(Translated by Google)
A must-visit spot for a coffee and a relaxing break after hours behind the wheel. The only gas station between Comodoro Rivadavia and Trelew. Friendly service and reasonable prices.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/12078125792324684984/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNoZ2ZHdndRRRAB

reviews.comment:
Atención esta es una parada obligada para cargar combustible de camino entre Comodoro Ribadavia y Trelew. No hay otra opción. Lo malo es que no cuenta con servicio de gomería.

(Translated by Google)
Attention: This is a mandatory stop for refueling on the road between Comodoro Ribadavia and Trelew. There is no other option. The downside is that it doesn't have a tire repair service.

reviews.comment:
Como recomendación: por favor cocinen bien la milanesa! Pagué un sándwich y encima de que era súper fina estaba cruda la carne! Un desastre.

(Translated by Google)
As a recommendation: please cook the breaded cutlet thoroughly! I paid for a sandwich and, on top of being super thin, the meat was raw! A disaster.
